base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dungeon_old_man_variants — a character from 1986 legend of zelda. Dungeon Old Man palette variants — 4 colors (red/blue/green/orange) for different dungeons. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Dungeon Old Man palette variants — 4 colors (red/blue/green/orange) for different dungeons; all use same body sprite
